subject: S200106au and S200106av: Retraction of GW compact binary merger candidates
submitter: Peter Shawhan at U of Maryland/LSC  <pshawhan@umd.edu>
body:
The LIGO Scientific Collaboration and the Virgo Collaboration report:

The triggers S200106au and S200106av were caused by chance
coincidences between light scattering episodes in the two LIGO
detectors and are no longer considered to be candidates of interest.
